Publications

* 교신저자

2026

  • Namhoon Kim, Joon-Hak Lee, Jin-Ho Ahn, & Sang-Ho Baek* (2026). M3C2-based deformation analysis of blast-resistant doors under explosive loads: A case study. KSCE Journal of Civil Engineering, 30(1), 100330. DOI Link

2025

  • 박준열, 김현재, 남동민, 유수홍, 김남훈, & 정재훈 (2025). 복셀 기반 3D U-Net 을 활용한 대용량 포인트 클라우드의 시맨틱 세그멘테이션 기법 개발. 한국측량학회지, 43(4), 437-447. DOI
  • Namhoon Kim* (2025). RPC Correction Coefficient Extrapolation for KOMPSAT-3A Imagery in Inaccessible Regions. Remote Sensing, 17(19), 3332. DOI Link
  • Namhoon Kim, Suhong Yoo, Hanna Lee, Sumin Park, & Gihong Kim* (2025). Applicability of the Geospatial Segment Anything Model for Reservoir Extraction Using KOMPSAT-3/3A Satellite Imagery. Sensors & Materials, 37, . DOI Link

2024

  • 김남훈, 전영준, & 백상호 (2024). 유형문화유산 3 차원 측량에서 저가 LiDAR 의 활용 가능성 평가. 한국측량학회지, 42(3), 225-234. DOI
  • Nguyen Hong Quang, Hanna Lee, Namhoon Kim, & Gihong Kim* (2024). Real-time flash flood detection employing the YOLOv8 model. Earth Science Informatics, 17(5), 4809-4829. DOI Link

2023

  • Suhong Yoo& Namhoon Kim* (2023). Coarse Alignment Methodology of Point Cloud Based on Camera Position/Orientation Estimation Model. Journal of Imaging, 9(12), 279. DOI Link
  • Namhoon Kim, Sangho Baek, & Gihong Kim* (2023). Absolute IOP/EOP Estimation Models without Initial Information of Various Smart City Sensors. Sensors, 23(2), 742. DOI Link

2021

  • Wonjun Choi, Soyeon Park, Yoonjo Choi, Seunghwan Hong, Namhoon Kim, & Hong-Gyoo Sohn* (2021). Creation of Actual CCTV Surveillance Map Using Point Cloud Acquired by Mobile Mapping System. Korean Journal of Remote Sensing, 37(5), 1361-1371. DOI Link

2020

  • Namhoon Kim, Yoonjo Choi, Junsu Bae, & Hong-Gyoo Sohn* (2020). Estimation and improvement in the geolocation accuracy of rational polynomial coefficients with minimum GCPs using KOMPSAT-3A. GIScience & Remote Sensing, 57(6), 719-734. DOI Link
  • Namhoon Kim, Junsu Bae, Cheolhwan Kim, Soyeon Park, & Hong-Gyoo Sohn* (2020). Object Distance Estimation Using a Single Image Taken from a Moving Rolling Shutter Camera. Sensors, 20(14), 3860. DOI Link

2019

  • Namhoon Kim, Ji Sang Lee, Jun Su Bae, & Hong Gyoo Sohn* (2019). Comparative analysis of exterior orientation parameters of smartphone images using quaternion-based SPR and PNP algorithms. Journal of the Korean Society of Surveying, Geodesy, Photogrammetry and Cartography, 37(6), 465-472. DOI

2017

  • Mi-Kyeong Kim, Sangpil Kim, Hong-Gyoo Sohn*, Namhoon Kim, & Je-Sung Park (2017). A New Recursive Filtering Method of Terrestrial Laser Scanning Data to Preserve Ground Surface Information in Steep-Slope Areas. ISPRS International Journal of Geo-Information, 6(11), 359. DOI Link

2016

  • Nam Hoon Kim, Sang Pil Kim, Mi Kyeong Kim, & Hong Gyoo Sohn* (2016). A genetic algorithm to solve the optimum location problem for surveillance sensors. Journal of the Korean Society of Surveying, Geodesy, Photogrammetry and Cartography, 34(6), 547-557. DOI

2015

  • Seunghwan Hong, Hyoseon Jang, Namhoon Kim, & Hong-Gyoo Sohn* (2015). Water Area Extraction Using RADARSAT SAR Imagery Combined with Landsat Imagery and Terrain Information. Sensors, 15(3), 6652-6667. DOI Link
